mapper.select: SELECT BH_ID AS bhId, DAY_OF_WEEK AS dayOfWeek, OPEN_TIME AS openTime, CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, USE_YN AS useYn, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), REG_DT, 120) AS regDt FROM BUSINESS_HOURS ORDER BY DAY_OF_WEEK ASC
SELECT BH_ID AS bhId, DAY_OF_WEEK AS dayOfWeek, OPEN_TIME AS openTime, CLOSE_TIME AS closeTime, USE_YN AS useYn FROM BUSINESS_HOURS WHERE BH_ID = #{bhId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BUSINESS_HOURS (BH_ID, DAY_OF_WEEK, OPEN_TIME, CLOSE_TIME, USE_YN, REG_DT) VALUES (#{bhId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{useYn}, GETDATE())
